transactions.delete_confirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.name: Name

tooltips.cost_basis: Total capital deployed across all positions, net of accrued interest for bonds.
tooltips.market_value: Current mark-to-market value of all holdings.
tooltips.total_pnl: Unrealized P&L (open positions) + realized P&L (closed positions). Income excluded.
tooltips.income: Cumulative dividends and bond coupons received since inception.
tooltips.xirr: Annualized money-weighted return (IRR). Reflects your actual return considering cash flow timing.
tooltips.avg_cost: Volume-weighted average purchase price. Adjusts with each new buy, unchanged on sells.
tooltips.weight: Position weight as percentage of total portfolio market value.
tooltips.pnl: Combined unrealized + realized profit or loss for this position.
tooltips.est_tax: Estimated capital gains tax on unrealized profits at configured rate. Zero on losses.
tooltips.income_col: Cumulative dividends and coupons received from this instrument.
tooltips.market_gain: Portfolio value change from market movements only. Excludes net new contributions.
tooltips.twr: Time-Weighted Return. Eliminates cash flow impact — measures pure investment performance.
tooltips.mwrr: Money-Weighted Return (IRR) for the period. Reflects actual investor experience including timing.
tooltips.volatility: Annualized standard deviation of daily TWR returns. Higher = more variable performance.
tooltips.sharpe_ratio: Excess return per unit of total risk. (Return - Risk Free) / Volatility. Above 1 is good.
tooltips.sortino_ratio: Excess return per unit of downside risk only. Ignores upside volatility. Higher is better.
tooltips.max_drawdown: Largest peak-to-trough decline in TWR. Measures worst-case loss from highest point.
